title: Fish Spi rally [FSRMP]
description: A feature mod pack for multiplayer games simplifies operations and improves experience through optimization, utilities, and enhanced features.
body:
![Modpack icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/403d9b261eb062d39d25e9c648aed998880e12bd.jpeg) > [By using this modpack, you agree to the GPL3.0 license](https://www.gnu.org/licenses/quick-guide-gplv3.en.html) ## Reasons for the recommended choice: > Everything you can imagine and cannot imagine, Fish Spirally ModPack can give you an explanation. > It integrates multiple auxiliary function mod, including QoL (Quality of Life) and visual enhancement, and has better game graphics and experience. > Stay up to date! Soon after a new version is released, Fish Spirally ModPack can be updated according to the update of the main mod in the modpack, which is only applicable to all survival and creative servers, but you still need to comply with server rules. > For the security of your account, please do not use it on any small game servers. > Improved profiles for multiplayer gaming and server performance FPS? **Through careful selection and optimization of mod, the Fish Spirally ModPack has extremely stable FPS performance. The installed optimized mod increases FPS by 1000% compared to the original version.** Compatibility? Compatibility is not an issue as the Fish Spirally ModPack almost uses open source or non-invasive mods to ensure compatibility and reduce game crashes. At the same time, you can also add mods yourself. Does Optifine support the function? **The Fish Spirally ModPack supports almost all OptiFine features, such as shadow loading, texture joining, and scaling, as shown in the [Optifine alternative mod](https://optifine.alternatives.lambdaurora.dev/) )on this website. While the transition may take some getting used to, the overall compatibility is much better compared to OptiFine.** How do I choose the version you publish? **The version format of the Fish Spirally ModPackage is: X-XX-XXX [B/A/X/U]. X-XX-XXX represents the number of modifications, personal usage, and update date; B is the initial mod pack; A is the configuration file and mod content adjustment; X is the final update; U is the simple update and error correction.**
**Usually, you just need to select the latest version, but you can also check what has been updated in each version to make your choice.** GPU？ - **The Fish Spirally ModPack supports OpenGL 4.6 compatible graphics card drivers.
Most graphics cards released after 2010 are compatible.
Compatible hardware includes: Intel HD Graphics 500 series (Skylake) or later, Nvidia GeForce 400 series (Fermi) or later, AMD Radeon HD 7000 series (GCN 1) or later.
Older graphics cards may work but require an OpenGL 3.3 driver, which is not officially supported and may not be compatible in the future.
Android devices using OpenGL translation layers (such as GL4ES, ANGLE) are not supported and may not be compatible with the Fish Spirally ModPack.
The translation layer may not implement the required features, be affected by underlying driver errors, and cannot be resolved.
If you encounter any issues, please update your graphics card driver to the latest version and check the relevant content on the Sodium Wiki.
Content from the Sodium Wiki, hardware compatibility section.** CPU？ - **Minimum CPU requirements: Intel Core i3-4160, AMD A8-7600 APU, Apple M1, or equivalent configurations, with allocated memory greater than 2GB.** ## Drive? - **The remaining capacity of the hard disk should be greater than 3GB, and the SSD should be used as much as possible** # FAQ **Looking forward to the update**
